sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n21049" key="brotoke/rths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βροτο-κέρτης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">κείρω</etym>) <sense id="n21049.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">man-shaver</tr_>, pedantic word for <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">barber</tr_>, Alexarch. ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1407.tlg002:5" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heraclid.Lemb.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
